EmailTemplate.description: Sales, CRM, IS, Compliance and Legal Team Email when a Due Diligence is create.
EmailTemplate.name: Due Diligence Created
EmailTemplate.subject: {!DueDiligence__c.Name} - is created
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello
This is to notify that the Due Diligence {!DueDiligence__c.Name} has been created.
View Legal Entity information by clicking here - {!DueDiligence__c.Link}
This is an automated email, please do no reply to this email.
